Taxonomy_x: Eukaryota; Viridiplantae; Streptophyta; Embryophyta; Marchantiophyta; Jungermanniopsida; Jungermanniidae; Jungermanniales; Lophocoleineae; Lepidoziaceae; Bazzanioideae; Bazzania
Taxonomy_y: Eukaryota; Viridiplantae; Streptophyta; Embryophyta; Marchantiophyta; Jungermanniopsida; Jungermanniidae; Jungermanniales; Lophocoleineae; Lepidoziaceae; Bazzanioideae; Bazzania
Assembly: The assembly cjBazTril2.1 is based on 68x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using OATK. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size.
